mapper.select: SELECT balance_id, user_id, grant_year, granted_days, grant_date, expiry_date, carried_over_days, used_days, created_at, updated_at FROM paid_leave_balance WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY grant_year DESC

SELECT balance_id, user_id, grant_year, granted_days, grant_date, expiry_date, carried_over_days, used_days, created_at, updated_at FROM paid_leave_balance WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND expiry_date >= #{today} AND (granted_days + carried_over_days - used_days) > 0 ORDER BY expiry_date ASC

SELECT balance_id, user_id, grant_year, granted_days, grant_date, expiry_date, carried_over_days, used_days, created_at, updated_at FROM paid_leave_balance WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND expiry_date >= #{today} AND (granted_days + carried_over_days - used_days) > 0 ORDER BY expiry_date ASC FOR UPDATE

SELECT balance_id, user_id, grant_year, granted_days, grant_date, expiry_date, carried_over_days, used_days, created_at, updated_at FROM paid_leave_balance WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND grant_year = #{grantYear} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO paid_leave_balance ( user_id, grant_year, granted_days, grant_date, expiry_date, carried_over_days, used_days, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{grantYear}, #{grantedDays}, #{grantDate}, #{expiryDate}, COALESCE(#{carriedOverDays}, 0.0), COALESCE(#{usedDays}, 0.0), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE paid_leave_balance SET used_days = #{usedDays}, carried_over_days = #{carriedOverDays}, granted_days = #{grantedDays}, grant_date = #{grantDate}, expiry_date = #{expiryDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE balance_id = #{balanceId}
